cases.title: Wuckovich v. Central Carolina Presbytery
cases.synopsis: The Committee on Judicial Business found Case 1, a complaint by RE Roy Y. Wuckovich against Central Carolina Presbytery, to be in order and recommended that a judicial commission be elected to adjudicate the matter. No full case report appears in this window; only the listing and brief recommendation are present.

cases.title: Toms et al. v. Central Florida Presbytery

parties.complainant_or_appellant: TE Russell D. Toms, et al.

cases.synopsis: The Committee on Judicial Business found Case 2, a complaint by TE Russell D. Toms et al. against the Presbytery of Central Florida, to be in order and recommended that a judicial commission be elected to adjudicate the matter. No full case report appears in this window; only the listing and brief recommendation are present.

cases.title: McLeod v. Gulf Coast Presbytery
cases.synopsis: Case 3, an appeal by RE George K. McLeod against Gulf Coast Presbytery, was found not in order because the appellant was no longer a member of the Presbyterian Church in America; his church voted to withdraw from the PCA on December 17, 1983.
